phase0_ab_test.description: Gemma 4 thinking mode A/B + lightweight model + dual model strategy

v28_think_on.description: Gemma 4 26B-A4B Q4_K_M with thinking ON (v28 baseline)

v28_think_on.note: INFLATED: item 4 judged 5/5 for 'I don't know' vs gold 'Summer Vibes' — thinking mode made judge unreliable
v28 ran 40 QA pairs only (different sample), not directly comparable

key_findings: 1. Thinking mode causes JUDGE UNRELIABILITY — v28 LongMemEval item 4 was judged 5/5 for completely wrong answer, inflating v28 score by 0.8 points
2. No-think mode produces SAME quality answers but with reliable judging — LongMemEval corrected score equals no-think
3. Qwen2.5-7B is SURPRISINGLY COMPETITIVE — LoCoMo LLM Score 3.17 vs Gemma4 no-think 2.97 (+7%)
4. Dual model (Gemma4 reader + Qwen7B judge) is VIABLE — LoCoMo 3.07, minimal quality delta vs single-model
5. No-think speed improvement: 37ms/token vs ~150ms/token with thinking — 4x faster generation

recommendations.dual_model: Use Qwen2.5-7B for routing/classification/judging tasks (fast, <100ms per call)
recommendations.rationale: Thinking mode wastes tokens on internal reasoning and corrupts judge reliability. No-think is Pareto-dominant.
